question: Are you licensed and insured?
answer: Yes. MTC Renovations carries full commercial general liability insurance and WSIB (Workplace Safety and Insurance Board) coverage. All of our tradespeople — electricians, plumbers, and HVAC technicians — are licensed Red Seal or Ontario-certified professionals. We are happy to provide proof of insurance and WSIB clearance certificates upon request before any work begins. Hiring an uninsured or unlicensed contractor puts your home and finances at risk. With MTC, you are fully protected.
